runners.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.3 lengths at this track over 530m (30.70) beating Mickey Haller in Grade 6 on April 9. Expected to measure up again.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 400m at Gawler behind Carry On Natasha beaten 7 lengths (22.97). Should prove hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at The Meadows (35.28) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Has two wins and three placings from nine starts from the draw. Looks one of the chances.
